title: Race condition in MVCC transaction management
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE baz(ref_id INTEGER, amount REAL DEFAULT 0.00, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES bar(id));
INSERT INTO baz(ref_id, amount) SELECT id, 100.50 FROM bar WHERE id > 1;
DELETE FROM bar WHERE id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM baz WHERE amount < 50.00);
key_bug_features: Race condition in MVCC transaction management
